'''Vodo-Siosk Baas's courier''' was the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]] traveled from [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] to [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] in with [[Sylvar]] and [[Crado]]. Vodo-Siosk later used this to travel to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to face [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]]
